title: Niekie3202s Performance Pack
description: Performance Pack is the best modpack to play the vanilla game that even an potato pc can run!
body:
Performance Pack is the best modpack to play the vanilla game that even an potato pc can run!

This modpack has a lot of optimization mods, such as sodium, ModernFix and Chunky for more FPS!

This modpack doesn't have much to offer, but if you just want to play the vanilla game, this modpack is amazing to get more performance thanks to the best performance mods.
